ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IsPickVal(StageName, "Closed Won") && ISBLANK(Marketing_Discount__c) && $Profile.Name != "System Administrator" && $Profile.Name != "Integration User" && $Profile.Name != "Integration User - API Only" && $Profile.Name != "Integration User" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended" && $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps Extended" && !$User.Financial_Invoice_Management__c && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Partnership" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Rank_Ranger" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Acquired_Company" && ISchanged ( StageName )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select all Discount Reasons that apply.
